pi_items.source: script analysis (setup_task.sh generates synthetic volume with these dimensions)
script analysis (setup_task.sh generates synthetic volume with these dimensions)

privileged_info_summary: The L1 vertebra in this synthetic CT scan has an anterior height of 28.5 mm and a posterior height of 32.0 mm, resulting in a compression ratio of approximately 0.8906. According to the Genant semi-quantitative method, a height loss of approximately 11% (ratio of 0.89) is classified as 'Normal' (Grade 0).
